official_functions.role: Construct the official Configuration clientbound resource_pack_pop packet fixture
Write and read the official Configuration clientbound resource_pack_pop body
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed resource_pack_pop packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed resource_pack_pop packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read the decoded optional UUID from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the resource_pack_pop body.
The official ClientboundResourcePackPopPacket.STREAM_CODEC writes the optional UUID body.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundResourcePackPopPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundResourcePackPopPacket preserves the present UUID for this packet-support fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, optional UUID presence/value, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove resource-pack UI behavior, pack removal policy, download/reload behavior, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer resource-pack UI behavior, pack removal policy, download/reload behavior, Configuration-to-Play readiness, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
